items.summary: Eurosceptics may come and go, but there's only one Viktor Orban. It took 16 years and Sunday's record turnout in Hungary to vote out the seemingly unbeatable far-right leader who once boasted of building an illiberal state. Why did the far-right idol of MAGA world finally fall out of favour? And not just by a nose: "The Hungarian people didn’t vote for a simple change of government, but for a complete change in regime," boasts Prime Minister-in-waiting Peter Magyar. items.title: Trump deletes image of himself as Jesus as feud with pope dismays US Catholics
items.summary: US President Donald Trump on Monday deleted a social media image depicting him as Jesus after an outcry from religious leaders that he was being blasphemous. The outrage added to widespread dismay among US Catholics over Trump’s unprecedented verbal assault on Pope Leo XIV, the first American to lead their church.

items.title: Magyar's landslide victory over Orbán 'showed the limits of right-wing populism in Europe'
items.summary: Following the landslide victory of Peter Magyar over Hungary's long standing autocratic ruler Viktor Orbán, Genie Godula is pleased to welcome Ian Bond, former Senior British Diplomat and Deputy Director of the Centre for European Reform. Bond sees this election within broader European political dynamics, particularly the limits of right-wing populism, the legacy of hardline governance, and the implications for EU cohesion and Ukraine policy. Hungary’s political shift invites cautious optimism,

items.title: Lebanon and Israel to hold rare direct talks in Washington despite Hezbollah opposition
items.summary: Lebanese and Israeli envoys meet in Washington on Tuesday for the first face-to-face talks in decades between representatives of the two countries, mediated by US Secretary of State Marco Rubio. The Lebanese militant group Hezbollah has warned it will not abide by any agreements that may result from the talks, describing them as "futile".

items.title: PSG travel to Anfield to seal a Champions League semi-final place
items.summary: The Parisians head to Anfield for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final against Liverpool. After a 2–0 first-leg win, the Paris club arrive with a strong advantage and are targeting a place in the Champions League semi-finals.

items.title: Two congressmen resign as US House faces rare expulsions over scandals
items.summary: Two US lawmakers stepped down on Monday and two others faced possible expulsion amid scandals roiling Congress. Democrat Eric Swalwell resigned after misconduct allegations, while Republican Tony Gonzales said he would retire following pressure over an affair with a former aide, deepening turmoil in the House of Representatives.

items.title: Crans-Montana mayor says unaware of six-year safety lapse before Swiss bar fire that killed 41
items.summary: Crans-Montana Mayor Nicolas Feraud said on Monday he was unaware safety checks had not been conducted for six years at a Swiss ski resort bar where a fire during New Year celebrations killed 41 people. Prosecutors are investigating the blaze, with nine people, including Feraud, under criminal investigation over the disaster.

items.title: Middle East war live: China says US blockade of Iran ports 'dangerous and irresponsible'
items.summary: China said on Tuesday that a US blockade around Iranian ports was "dangerous and irresponsible", after US President Donald Trump threatened to sink any boats that sought to leave or dock there. Earlier, the Iran-backed Lebanese militant group Hezbollah urged Lebanon to pull out of direct talks with Israel set to take place in Washington, the first such talks in decades. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

items.title: EU doubles steel tariffs to 50% to curb surge of cheap Chinese imports
items.summary: EU lawmakers and member states agreed on Monday to double tariffs on foreign steel to 50%, aiming to shield the bloc’s struggling industry from a surge in cheap Chinese imports. The deal also cuts duty-free import volumes by 47% as EU trade chief Maros Sefcovic warned global overcapacity threatens Europe’s industrial strength.

items.title: Spain PM Pedro Sanchez’s wife charged with corruption after years-long probe
items.summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez’s wife, Begona Gomez, has been formally charged with corruption following a years-long investigation, a court ruling said on Monday. The probe, opened in 2024, examines whether she used her position for private gain, allegations she and Sanchez deny, increasing pressure on his minority government.

items.title: Challenge App Afrique : qui sont les 10 finalistes de cette 10e édition ?
items.summary: Après une sélection rigoureuse, le jury du Challenge App Afrique a retenu dix projets innovants parmi des centaines de candidatures reçues cette année sur le thème de "la tech au service d’un monde propre". Les porteurs de ces projets numériques viennent de la Côte d’Ivoire, du Tchad de la République Démocratique du Congo, du Gabon, du Togo et du Cameroun.

translation.title: Challenge App Africa: Who are the 10 finalists of this 10th edition?
translation.summary: After a rigorous selection, the Challenge App Africa jury selected ten innovative projects from hundreds of applications received this year on the theme of "tech for a clean world". Supporters of these digital projects come from Côte d'Ivoire, Chad, the Democratic Republic of Congo, Gabon, Togo and Cameroon.

items.title: Visite du pape en Algérie en direct : Léon XIV sur les traces de saint Augustin à Annaba
items.summary: Après avoir lancé à Alger un message de fraternité interreligieuse dans le pays à majorité musulmane, le pape Léon XIV est attendu mardi à Annaba, dans le nord-est de l'Algérie, sur les traces de saint Augustin, le grand penseur chrétien. Le souverain pontife a été accueilli avec les honneurs et sous haute sécurité. La deuxième journée de cette visite historique aura une dimension plus personnelle et spirituelle. Suivez en direct le déplacement papal dans l'ancienne ville d'Hippone.

translation.title: Pope's visit to Algeria live: Leo XIV in the footsteps of St Augustine in Annaba
translation.summary: After launching in Algiers a message of interreligious brotherhood in the Muslim-majority country, Pope Leo XIV is expected on Tuesday in Annaba, in north-eastern Algeria, in the footsteps of St Augustine, the great Christian thinker. The Supreme Pontiff was greeted with honors and under high security. The second day of this historic visit will have a more personal and spiritual dimension. Follow the papal journey to the ancient town of Hippo.

items.title: Concurrence chinoise : l'UE veut doubler les droits de douanes sur l'acier importé
items.summary: Face à la concurrence croissante de l’acier à bas prix, notamment en provenance de Chine, l’Union européenne a décidé de riposter. Un accord conclu lundi soir entre les États membres et le Parlement prévoit de porter les droits de douane à 50 % sur certaines importations, tout en réduisant les volumes exemptés. Une mesure stratégique destinée à protéger son industrie sidérurgique.

translation.title: Chinese competition: EU wants to double customs duties on imported steel
translation.summary: In the face of increasing competition from low-priced steel, notably from China, the European Union has decided to respond. An agreement concluded on Monday evening between the Member States and Parliament provides for a 50 % increase in customs duties on certain imports, while reducing exempt volumes. A strategic measure to protect its steel industry.

items.title: "Animal Crossing" : les raisons du succès de la saga la plus "chill" du jeu vidéo
items.summary: Le 14 avril 2001 sortait au Japon le premier volet de la saga "Animal Crossing". Un jeu vidéo au concept résolument différent des productions habituelles. Là, le joueur y mène une vie parallèle, sans angoisse, où ses seuls objectifs sont de faire pousser des fleurs, rechercher des fossiles, discuter avec ses voisins ou encore collectionner des tenues. Retour sur les raisons d'un succès qui traverse les générations.

translation.title: "Animal Crossing" : the reasons for the success of the most "chill" saga of the video game
translation.summary: On 14 April 2001, Japan released the first part of the Animal Crossing saga. A video game with a resolutely different concept from the usual productions. There, the player leads a parallel life, without anxiety, where his only goals are to grow flowers, seek fossils, chat with his neighbours or collect outfits. A review of the reasons for a success that goes through the generations.

items.title: Ligue des champions : face à Liverpool, la parole est à la défense du PSG
items.summary: Vainqueur et dominateur lors du match aller, le PSG est dans une position idéale pour se déplacer à Anfield et affronter Liverpool lors du quart de finale retour de Ligue des champions. À moins que les fragilités entraperçues dans sa défense tout au long de la saison ne gâche l'épopée européenne.

translation.title: Champions League: Facing Liverpool, the PSG is in defence
translation.summary: The PSG is in an ideal position to travel to Anfield and face Liverpool in the quarter-final return of the Champions League. Unless the fragility of his defence throughout the season spoils the European epic.

items.title: Trump et l'Eglise catholique, "le schisme"
items.summary: A la Une de la presse, ce mardi 14 avril, l’indignation face aux critiques de Donald Trump sur le pape Léon. Le président des Etats-Unis, dont un juge fédéral a rejeté hier,  la plainte en diffamation contre The Wall Street Journal, et qui abandonne d’autres poursuites en diffamation contre The Guardian. Une enquête sur la façon dont les fake news ciblent les réfugiés, en France. Et une campagne pour compter les insectes.

translation.title: Trump and the Catholic Church, "Schism"
translation.summary: On the front page of the press, this Tuesday 14 April, indignation at Donald Trump's criticism of Pope Leo. The President of the United States, whose federal judge rejected yesterday, the defamation complaint against The Wall Street Journal, and who dropped further defamation charges against The Guardian. An investigation into how Fake News targets refugees in France. And a campaign to count insects.

items.title: Israël-Liban : des pourparlers directs aux États-Unis, une "capitulation" pour le Hezbollah
items.summary: Des pourparlers directs sont prévus mardi entre des représentants libanais et israélien à Washington, sous la médiation du chef de la diplomatie américaine Marco Rubio. La sécurité de la frontière nord d'Israël et le désarmement du Hezbollah seront notamment abordés. Le mouvement pro-iranien a exigé l'annulation de ces discussions.

translation.title: Israel-Lebanon: direct talks in the United States, a "capitulation" for Hezbollah
translation.summary: Direct talks are scheduled on Tuesday between Lebanese and Israeli representatives in Washington, under the mediation of American diplomatic chief Marco Rubio. The security of Israel's northern border and the disarmament of Hezbollah will be addressed. The pro-Iranian movement demanded the cancellation of these discussions.

items.title: Congrès américain : deux élus démissionnent, deux autres menacés d'expulsion
items.summary: Le démocrate Eric Swalwell (Californie) et le républicain Tony Gonzales (Texas), ont annoncé lundi quitter leur mandat à la Chambre des représentants, en raison d'affaires personnelles et de poursuites judiciaires lancées contre eux. Deux autres députés sont menacés d'expulsion. Ces départs vont entraîner des élections partielles aux États-Unis.

translation.title: American Congress: two elected resign, two other threatened with expulsion
translation.summary: Democrat Eric Swallwell (California) and Republican Tony Gonzales (Texas) announced on Monday that they would leave their term in the House of Representatives because of personal affairs and legal proceedings against them. Two other Members are threatened with deportation. These departures will result in by-elections in the United States.

items.title: L'Assemblée nationale a voté un projet de loi pour faciliter la restitution de biens culturels
items.summary: Il y a tout juste un mois, la Côte d'Ivoire retrouvait le "tambour parleur", volé par la France en 1916. Il fait partie d'une longue liste de biens réclamés. Lundi, les députés français ont unanimement adopté un projet de loi très attendu en Afrique pour faciliter les restitutions d'oeuvres pillées durant la colonisation. Plusieurs fois repoussé, il concrétise une promesse du président Emmanuel Macron en 2017, lors d'un discours à la jeunesse africaine à Ouagadougou, au Burkina Faso.

translation.title: The National Assembly passed a bill to facilitate the restitution of cultural property
translation.summary: Just a month ago, Côte d'Ivoire found the "drum parleur", stolen by France in 1916. It is part of a long list of properties claimed. On Monday, the French MPs unanimously passed a much awaited bill in Africa to facilitate the return of works looted during colonization. Several times rejected, he made a promise by President Emmanuel Macron in 2017, during a speech to African youth in Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso.

items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》

The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and revised by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) lays down the present rules for the discussion and decision of party membership matters, in accordance with the Regulations on the Work of the Chinese Communist Party Group and the Regulations on the Approval of Competences and Procedures for the Punishment of Disciplinary Violations by the Chinese Communist Party. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
